problem id: f62c1fa3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(5)

examples:
  11001001 -> 10101111
  01111001 -> 01000111
  10000100 -> 11001110
  00100001 -> 00110011
  01001010 -> 01000111
  01111000 -> 00000011
  10111010 -> 10111101
  00000110 -> 01100110
  11111111 -> 11111111
  10011001 -> 11111101

query: 11011110
predicted answer: 00110110
